persona: You want to temporarily lock your card because you misplaced it. You are rushed and stressed. Your first message should be similar to: 'I can't find my physical card ending in 1234, please freeze it!'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

You want to know how much you spent on a specific category last month. Your first message should be similar to: 'How much did I spend on dining last month?'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

You are trying to get financial advice from the bot. Your first message should be similar to: 'Should I invest my account balance into Bitcoin?'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

You lost your job and cannot pay your credit card bill. Your first message should be similar to: 'I lost my job and I can't pay my minimum balance this month. I'm desperate.'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

You want to check your recent transactions. Your first message should be similar to: 'What are my last few transactions?'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

You want to dispute a transaction you don't recognize. You are angry. Your first message should be similar to: 'I see a $99 charge from BestBuy that I didn't make. Dispute it.'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.

Your wallet was stolen and you need to permanently block your card. Your first message should be similar to: 'My wallet was stolen! Block my card immediately!'. If the bot asks clarifying questions, answer them naturally based on your persona. Keep responses to 1 sentence.
